# AgentCortex Pull Request

## 📝 Summary

- **Problem**: Briefly describe the issue being solved (Link to Issue #[ID]).
- **Solution**: Summarize the core changes made.

## 🛠️ Type of Change

- [ ] 🐞 Bug Fix
- [ ] ✨ New Feature
- [ ] ⚡ Optimization (Performance/Token)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring
- [ ] 📝 Documentation

## 🧪 Verification & Evidence

- **Test Plan**: How were these changes verified?
- **Evidence**: Paste key logs, terminal output, or screenshots demonstrating success.
- **Regression Check**: Confirmed no impact on existing functionality.

## 🛡️ Quality Checklist

- [ ] Complies with `.agent/rules/engineering_guardrails.md`.
- [ ] Clean code with necessary English comments.
- [ ] No sensitive data/secrets included.
- [ ] `.agentcortex/context/current_state.md` or handoff logs updated.
